name: How long do I have to sue a lawyer for bad ChatGPT advice in New York?
description: 3 years from discovery in NY; check your state.

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to sue a lawyer for bad ChatGPT advice in New York?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3 years from discovery in NY; check your state.
acceptedAnswer.description: 3 years from discovery of malpractice. Context: NY CPLR §214(6) governs legal malpractice; clock starts on harm awareness. Key factors: Continuous representation tolls, fraud extends. Practical guidance: Document timeline, consult NY bar referral, file before deadline. Nationwide average 2-6 years.
